Your Path In

Four steps to your best health

  1. 1

    Enroll on EllieMD

    Visit elliemd.com/lindyrefresh and complete your health assessment. A licensed provider reviews your history within 48 hours.

  2. 2

    Register Here

    Fill in the form above with the same email you used on EllieMD. We verify your enrollment and send your Wellness Oasis invite within 24 hours.

  3. 3

    Join the Community

    Click Join Group on The Wellness Oasis page, introduce yourself in the community, and dive into the resource library, live coaching calendar, and member forums.

  4. 4

    Start Thriving

    Your medication ships within 2–10 business days. Lindy walks alongside you with personalized coaching every step of the way.

What's Available Through EllieMD

Personalized programs for every goal

Every program is medically reviewed, pharmacist-fulfilled, and coach-guided.

Weight Loss

GLP-1 Therapy

Semaglutide and tirzepatide — injections or oral drops — with optional NAD+, L-Carnitine, and Glycine for enhanced results.

Hormone Health

Menopausal HRT

Bioidentical hormone therapy tailored to your labs, symptoms, and life stage with ongoing provider oversight.

Peptides

BPC-157, Sermorelin, Thymosin Alpha-1, Selank, NAD+ and more for recovery, immunity, and anti-aging.

Nutrition

GLP-1 Support+

All-in-one protein formulated for body composition, gut health, and muscle maintenance during weight loss.

Questions Answered

Frequently asked questions

Do I have to sign up with EllieMD to join?
Yes — enrollment through elliemd.com/lindyrefresh is required. This ensures every member has clinical support, so coaching conversations are meaningful and medically grounded. Your EllieMD account is free to create.
What is peptide therapy and is it safe?
Peptides are short chains of amino acids that act as biological messengers. Compounded peptide therapies through EllieMD are dispensed from state-licensed, 503A-compliant pharmacies and prescribed by licensed medical providers after a full health review. Compounded medications are not FDA-approved.
What does The Wellness Oasis community include?
Weekly live Q&A calls with Lindy, a growing education library on nutrition and peptides, accountability challenges, a member forum, guest expert sessions, and peer community support — all in one place — The Wellness Oasis on Skool.
How long until my medication arrives?
Once approved, medication ships directly to your home from a licensed partner pharmacy, typically within 2–10 business days. You'll receive tracking information via email.
Is this a faith-based community?
Lindy's coaching is faith-forward and warmly welcomes women of all backgrounds. Scripture and encouragement are woven throughout, but faith is never a requirement to participate or benefit from the community.
Can I get help choosing the right program?
Absolutely. EllieMD offers a free 15-minute expert consultation — plus a $25 credit toward your first order.
